allow: PowerShell(gh api repos/Ninaji/Frosty-Tatics/contents/ --jq ".[] | .name + \\" \(\\" + .type + \\"\)\\"" 2>&1; gh api repos/Ninaji/Frosty-Tatics/commits --jq ".[0:3] | .[] | .sha[0:7] + \\" \\" + .commit.message" 2>&1)

PowerShell($contents = gh api repos/Ninaji/Frosty-Tatics/contents/ | ConvertFrom-Json; $contents | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.name\) \($\($_.type\)\)" }; $commits = gh api repos/Ninaji/Frosty-Tatics/commits | ConvertFrom-Json; $commits | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.sha.Substring\(0,7\)\) $\($_.commit.message\)" })
